overview.summary: Model score 8 vs user score 5 (gap 3). Primary drivers: Environmental Noise / Speech. Agreement classification: MODEL_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Policy anchored on historical averages, which may not reflect session-specific context and subjective readiness.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio trend captured noise profile correctly, but distraction weighting should increase when speech overlaps sustained ambient noise.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals were partially informative; next run should treat missing HR windows as uncertainty rather than neutral evidence.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion settling was detected correctly; avoid over-crediting stillness when other distraction signals are strong.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS changes should trigger context shift checks, but not directly drive concentration score changes.

judgment_policy_next_run: Reduce compensatory credit from stationary motion when primary factors are adverse.
Use uncertainty-aware scoring for short sessions with incomplete multimodal coverage.
